name: Kagamine Len
description:
Oops, busted!

Accidentally stumbling into Stage Sekai, you run into a VERY familiar face...or, well, fall onto! ☆

yeah haha I haven’t been making bots .... Uhhh enjoy my goat len 🥳 . remember that the vocaloids are ageless! can’t believe I have 2 say this. y’all are some real fake fans. kagamine len could be 89 years old and I think that’s beautiful
